name: European Cocoa Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square pan with foil by buttering the foil.
2. In a 4-quart saucepan, mix together the sugar, cocoa, and salt.
3. Stir in the milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a rolling boil.
4. Boil without stirring until the mixture reaches 234 degrees Fahrenheit. Remove from heat.
5. Add butter and vanilla extract. Do not stir!
6. Allow the mixture to cool at room temperature until it reaches 110 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Beat with a wooden spoon until the fudge thickens and loses some of its gloss.
8. Spread quickly into the prepared pan.
9. Cool. Makes about 1 3/4 pounds of fudge. Regular cocoa works well, too.
